title: Data — The New Currency of the Modern World
excerpt: Session notes from a 75-minute Future Pathways talk at TIPS Erode — what data is, how every profession is now data-driven, and why data careers that need zero coding are among the best opportunities open to Humanities, Arts and Commerce students today.

title: Process to Outcomes
excerpt: An educator's reflections on how AI is shifting the unit of value from process to outcome — and why the same shift matters just as much in classrooms and counselling rooms as it does in boardrooms.

title: Chemical Engineering & Why Research Matters
excerpt: Key takeaways from a session by Prof. Kannan Kandasamy at TIPS School Erode — what chemical engineering is, why the world urgently needs it, career scope in India and abroad, and a seven-step research roadmap any IGCSE student can start today.

excerpt: Key takeaways from IIT Bombay's official JEE Advanced Open House — flexible curriculum, open labs, AI + X philosophy, global exchange, and a first-year playbook for making the most of four years at India's flagship engineering institution.

title: Built for This: A Guide to Thriving as a Student
excerpt: What you believe shapes what you do — and what you do shapes who you become. A practical guide to the beliefs, habits, and mindset shifts that help students go from getting by to truly thriving.

excerpt: Key takeaways from a May 2026 ISP webinar by Macarena Aguirre — how the US athletic scholarship process works, what counsellors need to know, and how to support student-athletes from any sport level through MAE Sports & Education.

title: The Psychology of Career Decisions: Why Students Don't Choose Careers Rationally
excerpt: Key takeaways from a TEDxWesleyanU talk by Sharon Belden Castonguay — why career decisions are mostly irrational, how the social surround limits student choices, and what it means to treat identity as a script rather than an equation.

title: Critical Thinking in Career Counselling: Using the RED Model to Strengthen Your Practice
excerpt: A structured guide for career counsellors on applying the RED model — Recognise Assumptions, Evaluate Arguments, Draw Conclusions — to sharpen your own practice and build critical thinking skills in students.

excerpt: Key takeaways from an IACAC webinar on campus visits — a practical 5W framework covering preparation, observation, note-taking, and follow-through for school counsellors.

excerpt: Five key takeaways from the Salesforce Great Asia AI Summit and an HBR Ideacast podcast — grounding counsellors in the real-world AI conversation so they can answer students' hardest questions about computer science and data science.

excerpt: Key takeaways from a Unifrog webinar on psychometric testing — helping counsellors prepare students for the assessments used by companies like Nestlé and Rolls-Royce, and the direct link to Unifrog's self-assessment tools.

title: You Are Your Only Competition

excerpt: From building a strong academic profile to choosing the right university pathway, these ten tips will help high school students navigate their future with confidence.
